summary: Implemented dynamic live semantic query retrieval: non-golden prompts now get on-the-fly semantic query vectors in the Context Pack path, with regression/current status verifiers, verify:goal wiring, health/freshness/Observatory readiness exposure, and a corrected context golden for explicit Google RAG source lookup.
decisions: Do not persist ad-hoc live query vectors to dense-vectors.json; attach them in memory for retrieval proof to avoid dirtying the vault per prompt.
A dense index with record vectors but no query vectors is valid when a semantic provider can compute live query embeddings.
Generic source golden prompts should not require a specific Google source; the Google expectation was made explicit in the query text.
verify:goal now treats live semantic query evidence as a separate hard requirement from golden-set RAG proof/eval.
next_steps: Add completion-grade answer-quality verifier beyond the local extractive judge.
Add review backlog and compounding lifecycle hard verifiers.
Refresh live Codex Desktop hook proof after rebuilt server mtime changes before claiming full verify:goal completion.
Continue install-equivalence and release-manifest hard-gate work.
